insight: When an opponent has significant attack pressure (e.g., ~8 attack per turn from Tarsiers), having a Fabricator on the board is also a vulnerability because it is an expensive unit that can be targeted by breach attacks, adding to the risk of running a Fabricator-based strategy under pressure.
author: Deleted User
context: During a set discussion, a player noted the Fabricator's vulnerability to breach damage in the context of Tarsier-based pressure strategies.
